headlines.headline: Zelvel Capital begins scheduled maintenance of precision manufacturing systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has negligible impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
